title: MP4FAULT
description: Hi, I’m MPEG4-MAN , a YouTuber who makes Minecraft animations. I’ve created a Minecraft Bedwars texture pack with many helpful features. This pack is a default edit that fixes issues, improves visibility, and simplifies effects for better PvP gameplay.
body:
Requires OptiFine

I’m MPEG4-MAN, a YouTuber who creates Minecraft animations.
This is a Minecraft Bedwars texture pack designed to enhance gameplay with simple, performance-friendly improvements.

📺 Subscribe: YouTube - MPEG4-MAN

Note: This pack does not replace every block or item. It is a minimal edit of default Minecraft, focusing on clarity and small visual fixes.

Features

Removed pumpkin overlay

Clearer potion effects (easier to spot invisible players)

Red trapped chests

Improved nether portal

Refined glass textures

Updated swords, pickaxes, and axes

New bed designs

Enhanced crosshair and health bar

Darker inventory theme

Reduced fire overlay

Transparent, more visible water

Less snow and rain

Updated block breaking animation

Improved golden apple, water bucket, lava bucket, and milk bucket textures

Reworked armor textures

Enjoy the pack and good luck in Bedwars! 🎮
